summary: Frontend testing complete for /blog/ice-maker-troubleshooting page. All 24 test features from the Precision Craft design system passed. Page correctly implements hero with breadcrumb, symptom picker, TOC with 12 anchor links, 10 fix sections with numbered badges, DarkBox components (QUICK FIX text and HOW TO RESET numbered steps), CauseList, Mid-article CTA, Checklist, FAQ accordion, Bottom CTA, Author box, 3 sidebar widgets, Related Services, footer, floating button, and mobile sticky bar.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /blog/ice-maker-troubleshooting page is fully functional with all Precision Craft design elements. This is a static React component with no backend API calls. Uses custom SEOMetaTags + useSchemas for SEO (NOT react-helmet-async). The DarkBox component supports both text children (Fix 1 QUICK FIX) and numbered steps array (Fix 7 HOW TO RESET) - both render correctly.
